payload.description: Submits the monthly MTA crime report regarding major felonies and hate crimes in the NYCT Subway system

tool_args.label: Police Department City of New York

payload.entity_name: Police Department City of New York

payload.description: Subway system where major felonies and hate crimes are reported

tool_args.label: Total Major Felonies January thru August 2023
Figures are preliminary and subject to revision

payload.gap_text: FIGURES ARE PRELIMINARY AND SUBJECT TO FURTHER ANALYSIS AND REVISION

payload.claim_text: The purpose of this report is to provide Committee Members with statistical information regarding the number of major felonies (including homicide, robbery, assault, and rape) in addition to hate crimes occurring in the NYCT Subway system.
payload.description: The report is submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis for the month prior to the reporting period.

tool_args.label: Source submitted by NYPD Transit Bureau
NYPD Transit Bureau is part of NYPD
